title: pavonia sidifolia f. morongii
intro: Pavonia sidifolia f. morongii, also known as the Pavonia sidifolia variety, is a plant species within the Malvaceae family, commonly referred to as the hollyhock mallow. This plant has been utilized in traditional medicine, particularly in Mexico, due to its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Pavonia sidifolia f. morongii include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of various infections. Pavonia sidifolia f. morongii can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
